# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2019-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(concat('Microsoft.DocumentDb/databaseAccounts/', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDb/databaseAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "managedServiceIdentityId": "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value)]")]
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE",
              "value": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-web')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
              "value": "~3"
            },
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value)]")]
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "[parameters('functionAppPackageUrl')]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
